---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement / 建议一个新功能或改进
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case / 你的使用场景
Describe the situation where you need this feature / 描述你在什么情况下需要这个功能。

## Proposed Solution / 期望的解决方案
Describe how you'd like it to work / 描述你希望怎样实现。

## Alternatives Considered / 替代方案
Describe any alternative solutions you've considered / 描述你考虑过的其他替代方式。

## Additional Context / 补充信息
Any other information that helps understand the request / 其他有助于理解需求的信息。
